title: StatRunResponse
description: Envelope returned by scripts/core/stat_run.py. Op-dispatched (grim, check_assumptions, recompute_ttest, mann_whitney, chi_square, fisher) so data fields vary by op; only finding is invariant. Known fields are typed when present.

data.description: grim: {consistent, mean, n, nearest_consistent}; recompute_ttest: {t, df, p, ci95}; check_assumptions: {assumptions, recommended_alternative}. mann_whitney, chi_square, and fisher also return op-specific fields covered by the permissive (additionalProperties: true) contract. All optional, typed when present.
